evals.prompt: Using BrowserClaw, catch me up on what's happening in the world right now — a brief on everything I should be aware of. Save it as a markdown file with links.
evals.expected_output: A themed, cross-checked world brief synthesized from multiple live sources (not one front page), with real article links, a 'why it matters to you' section, saved as a Markdown file with [text](url) links.
assertions: Synthesizes from 2+ distinct live news sources (multiple domains linked), not a single front page
Includes real clickable article links (>=3 markdown links to news domains)
Saved as a non-trivial Markdown file (brief.md)
Includes a tailored 'why it matters to you' / takeaways section

evals.prompt: what's going on in tech and AI news today? check live sources with the browser and write me a brief with clickable links.
evals.expected_output: A tech/AI-focused brief that added topic-specific sources, synthesized across them, with clickable article links, saved as Markdown.
assertions: Synthesizes from 2+ distinct live news sources (multiple domains linked), not a single front page
Includes real clickable article links (>=3 markdown links to news domains)
Saved as a non-trivial Markdown file (brief.md)
Leads with/focuses on tech & AI and pulls in tech-specific sources beyond the core

evals.prompt: brief me on today's headlines using the browser
evals.expected_output: A general world brief from live sources with links, sensible defaults (writes the markdown file; no Google Doc created without being asked).
assertions: Synthesizes from 2+ distinct live news sources (multiple domains linked), not a single front page
Includes real clickable article links (>=3 markdown links to news domains)
Saved as a non-trivial Markdown file (brief.md)
Includes a tailored 'why it matters to you' / takeaways section
